calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2009 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Continued To Feb-17-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Robert Resner, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 2/17/2009 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Mary Ellen Scherer, CSR# 5208. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-16-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for settlement on the record.
Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Robert Resner, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff Creditors Trade Assoc, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Gary Rooney is also present in court.
Defendant Joel Kaplan present in proper.

Case settled and read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff will dismiss the action with prejudice, in exchange for the Defendant releases of all individuals and related parties to the action, and it's employee from any liability.
Parties agreed to terms, and will reduce the terms of the settlement to writing.

The Court deemed the matter settled, and placed the matter on CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar in Dept. 212 on Dec. 16, 2008 at 10:00 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Set For Trial On Oct-27-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
